title: Digital Dreams (Synthwave for Coding)
musicgen_prompt: An introspective synthwave track with DX7 pads and Juno plucks in C# minor. Gated reverb drums and sidechained TB-3 bass create a deep, spacey vibe. Tempo: 96 BPM.
cover_prompt: A retro-futuristic cityscape at night, with neon lights and digital screens reflecting off the rain-drenched streets.

youtube.title: Digital Dreams (Synthwave for Coding)
youtube.description: Chill coding music for late nights or programming sessions. Elevate your work environment with this nostalgic synthwave track. Perfect for focus and relaxation.
